items.author: vertexaisearch.cloud.google.com
items.snippet:
Kalshi is a regulated prediction market exchange where users can trade contracts on the outcomes of real-world events. While not an AI platform itself, it has become a significant arena for the application of artificial intelligence in market analysis and automated trading.

---

### Overview and Key Concepts

Kalshi operates as a federally regulated exchange in the United States, allowing individuals to buy and sell "event contracts" tied to specific outcomes, such as political elections, econo
